mapper.sql: select id, bid_id, word_preset, page_words, global_writing_direction, global_writing_requirement, create_time, update_time from tdw_plan_setting
mapper.insert:
insert into tdw_plan_setting
bid_id, word_preset, page_words, global_writing_direction, global_writing_requirement, create_time, update_time,
#{bidId}, #{wordPreset}, #{pageWords}, #{globalWritingDirection}, #{globalWritingRequirement}, now(), now(),

insert into tdw_plan_setting( bid_id, word_preset, page_words, global_writing_direction, global_writing_requirement, create_time, update_time ) values ( #{bidId}, #{wordPreset}, #{pageWords}, #{globalWritingDirection}, #{globalWritingRequirement}, now(), now() ) on duplicate key update word_preset = values(word_preset), page_words = values(page_words), global_writing_direction = values(global_writing_direction), global_writing_requirement = values(global_writing_requirement), update_time = now()
